name: KPI Card
description: Single headline metric with bold number, label, optional delta badge and sparkline inline. Highest visual weight — always the top row.

name: Stat Card
description: KPI variant with icon, contextual subtitle, and small progress bar or mini trend underneath the number. Suited for operational counts.

name: Gauge
description: Radial arc or dial showing a single value relative to a target. SVG stroke-dasharray animation on enter. Use for rate or fulfillment metrics.

name: Progress Bar
description: Horizontal bar showing completion ratio with percentage label. Stack multiple bars for comparison. Animates fill on enter.

name: Ranking List
description: Sorted list of items with inline bar proportional to value. Rank number badge on left. Good for top-N analysis.

name: Bar Chart
description: Categorical comparison. Supports grouped and stacked variants. Gradient fill on bars optional. Horizontal variant suits long category labels.

name: Line Chart
description: Time-series or sequential trend. Smooth curves, dot markers, multi-series with distinct colors. Supports reference lines for targets.

name: Area Chart
description: Filled line chart for cumulative or stacked trends. Semi-transparent fill with gradient. Emphasizes volume and accumulation.

name: Pie / Donut Chart
description: Part-to-whole composition. Donut variant with center label for primary metric. Max 6 segments; beyond that use bar chart. Hover expands slice.

name: Scatter Plot
description: Correlation between two numeric dimensions. Bubble variant adds a third dimension via dot size. Ideal for outlier detection.

name: Radar / Spider Chart
description: Multi-axis comparison of a subject across 3–8 dimensions. Compare multiple subjects by overlaying polygons. Suited for profiling.

name: Funnel Chart
description: Sequential stage conversion from top to bottom. Each stage narrower by conversion rate. Highlights drop-off percentage.

name: Heatmap
description: 2D grid where color intensity encodes value magnitude. Calendar heatmap for activity over time. Matrix heatmap for cross-dimension density.

name: Treemap
description: Hierarchical data as nested rectangles sized by value. Color encodes a second dimension. Best for proportional part-of-whole with many categories.

name: Mixed Chart
description: Bar and line on the same axes — typically volume bars + rate line. Dual y-axes when units differ. Expresses correlation between two metrics.

name: Data Table
description: Sortable, filterable tabular data with sticky header and row striping. Supports numeric columns right-aligned, inline sparklines per row, conditional cell coloring.

name: Timeline / Activity Feed
description: Chronological list of events with icon, label, value, and timestamp. Scrollable feed format. Suited for recent transactions or activity logs.

name: Filter Bar
description: Shared controls — date range picker, single-select, multi-select, search input. Affects all subscribed widgets. Always visible and accessible.
